health.title: Project Health
health.capacityReason: Open estimates exceed team timeline capacity.
health.priorityReason: More than 40% of open tasks are high priority.
health.overdueAction: Review overdue work and reset dates or owners.
health.blockedAction: Clear blockers before starting more work.
health.capacityAction: Reduce scope, extend timeline, or add capacity.
health.priorityAction: Separate true critical-path work from normal priority work.
health.dependenciesAction: Add key dependencies for setup, integration, testing, and release.
health.healthyAction: Keep updating task status and blockers.

accuracy.title: Planning Accuracy
accuracy.subtitle: Optional time tracking for better estimates and billing support

integrations.githubHelp: Optional code activity connection for this project
integrations.adminOnly: Only owners and admins can manage project integrations.
integrations.calendarHelp: Push approved task dates to your real calendar
integrations.calendarNote: Outlook Calendar support is planned next. Google Calendar is available now.
integrations.calendarAdminOnly: Only owners and admins can change calendar sync settings.
integrations.slackHelp: Send useful project updates to a team channel
integrations.teamsNote: Microsoft Teams notifications can use the same webhook-style pattern later.
integrations.slackAdminOnly: Only owners and admins can manage Slack notifications.

team.title: Team ({{count}})
team.noUsers: No existing users available. Invite by email above.
team.adminOnly: Only owners and admins can invite, remove, or change project roles.

detail.noTasks: No tasks yet. Add a task or generate them with AI.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Select a task to view details and chat with AI
assistant.emptyHelp: Click any task in the list to view its details, implementation steps, and chat with AI about it.
